_comment: AI HOT 早报 hero 基调池。每日按 $DATE hash 抽一条。gen_hero.py 读取本文件。新增/删除基调只改这里。
_source: 30 张清晨感候选中郭大大选 20
common_head: Minimalist hand-drawn illustration in Anthropic Claude blog style:
common_tail: bold black outline strokes, flat illustration aesthetic, plenty of empty space, light and airy morning feel, no text no letters no words, ultra wide cinematic 21:9 composition
